name: Hanesbrands Inc.
description: Hanesbrands Inc. is a socially responsible manufacturer and marketer of leading everyday basic apparel under some of the world's strongest apparel brands. The company's portfolio includes iconic innerwear and activewear brands such as Hanes, Champion, Maidenform, Bali, Playtex, and Bonds. Headquartered in Winston-Salem, North Carolina, Hanesbrands is known for its large-scale, low-cost global supply chain and its commitment to environmental sustainability and social responsibility.
